section.class: tw-py-8 tw-px-4 md:tw-px-8 tw-max-w-7xl tw-mx-auto tw-relative tw-z-10

div.class: carousel slide carousel-fade tw-relative tw-h-[400px] md:tw-h-[500px] tw-w-full tw-rounded-[30px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-shadow-lg

img.class: tw-absolute tw-inset-0 tw-w-full tw-h-full tw-object-cover tw-object-center

tw-absolute tw-inset-0 tw-w-full tw-h-full tw-object-cover tw-object-center
tw-absolute tw-inset-0 tw-w-full tw-h-full tw-object-cover tw-object-center

div.class: tw-absolute tw-bottom-6 tw-left-6 tw-right-6 tw-bg-[#1a1a1a]/60 tw-backdrop-blur-md tw-border tw-border-white/10 tw-rounded-[30px] tw-p-6 md:tw-p-8 tw-flex tw-justify-between tw-items-center tw-z-20
slide-text-group tw-absolute tw-top-0 tw-left-0 tw-w-full tw-transition-opacity tw-duration-500 tw-opacity-100

span.class: tw-text-gray-300 tw-text-sm tw-mb-1 tw-block slide-anim delay-100

h1.class: tw-text-white tw-text-2xl md:tw-text-4xl tw-font-bold tw-mb-4 slide-anim delay-200

a.class: tw-inline-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-w-[140px] tw-py-2 tw-text-white tw-rounded-full tw-text-sm btn-beli slide-anim delay-300

tw-absolute tw-bottom-4 tw-right-4 tw-flex tw-items-center tw-gap-1
tw-bg-white tw-rounded-[22px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-shadow-sm hover:tw-shadow-md tw-transition-shadow tw-relative tw-h-[255px]
tw-h-4 tw-bg-gray-200 tw-rounded tw-w-3/4 tw-mb-2 tw-animate-pulse
tw-h-3 tw-bg-gray-200 tw-rounded tw-w-1/2 tw-mb-4 tw-animate-pulse

section.class: tw-max-w-7xl tw-mx-auto tw-px-4 md:tw-px-8 tw-py-8 tw-mb-16

div.class: tw-bg-[#212529] tw-rounded-[44px] tw-overflow-hidden tw-flex tw-flex-col md:tw-flex-row
tw-p-10 md:tw-p-16 tw-flex-1 tw-flex tw-flex-col tw-justify-center
div.p: UniTrade adalah platform marketplace yang ditujukan untuk mahasiswa dalam melakukan jual beli produk dan jasa. Melalui UniTrade, mahasiswa dapat menjual kebutuhan akademik, barang bekas layak pakai, maupun jasa, dengan sistem yang terstruktur, transparan, dan mudah digunakan. Fitur verifikasi penjual mahasiswa juga disediakan untuk meningkatkan keamanan dan kepercayaan dalam transaksi.

div.class: tw-w-64 tw-h-64 tw-border-[10px] tw-border-white/20 tw-rounded-full tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center
